name: Face proposals
description: Detects faces in new photos (preview only) and lands unconfirmed media.face_region proposals; you name and confirm them in Photos. Confirmed regions are never touched again.
prompt: When new photos arrive, look at each one's preview and mark where the faces are as normalized boxes with confidence scores. Never guess who anyone is — I confirm identities myself in the Photos app. Never touch a region I've already confirmed.

vault.why: Reads new photos' preview/thumb derivatives, detects face regions, and stages unconfirmed proposals for the owner's confirm loop in Photos (issue #299 phase 3).
